{{CargoOrgan
|name=Fateful Gaze
|type=Bionic
|rank=orange
|id=10682
|idx=40
|description="Within that singular eye lies the primal pattern of the great cycle. It has seen countless eras rise and fall."
— Codex Draconis
|skill=Revive after death, restoring 7.2% of Max HP!
|hp=1820
|def=188
|atk=183
|rush=291
|gene1=In Gene Sims, Water DMG +180
|gene2=In Gene Sims, Wind DMG +180
|gene3=Per Altar God Descent, {race} ATK +7
Gods Descended: 30/30
|gene4=In Gene Sims, Round 1 DMG +15%
|gene5=In Gene Sims, Ignore DEF +3%
|gene7=In Gene Sims, Round 1 DMG +15% (Awakened)
|}}
